Need a checkout and in process.  When checkout is run it exports the forecast data to a flat file.  During checkout the forecast on existing records cannot be changed, new records can be added and those can have forecast changes.  For checking-in a flat file will be dropped into a shared location and it will be imported, if successful the forecast fields are unlocked for editing.   if there is excess qty on the record all fields are white, if the excess is consumed or does not exist turn the cells in lead-time red.
